mods.name: High-Flow Intake
mods.description: Feed the legendary 2.5L 5-cylinder TFSI engine cleaner, denser air while amplifying the unique 5-cylinder induction sound.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install carbon fiber or aluminum intake system. The RS3 intake path is unique — ensure proper MAF sensor positioning. 20 minutes.

mods.name: Performance Exhaust (Valved)
mods.description: A valved exhaust system lets the 5-cylinder sing at full volume or stay quiet for neighbors. The RS3's exhaust note is one of its best features.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the downpipe flange back. Valved systems connect to factory exhaust mode switch or Bluetooth controller. Dual or quad exit options. 1.5 hours.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the RS3 by 15–20mm for a more aggressive stance. The Magnetic Ride suspension remains fully functional with compatible springs.
mods.installNotes: Must use Magnetic Ride-compatible springs. Standard springs will damage the MR dampers. Spring compressor required. Alignment after install.

mods.name: ECU Tune (Stage 1)
mods.description: The 2.5 TFSI responds phenomenally to tuning. Stage 1 adds 60–80hp with no hardware changes, making the RS3 a sub-4-second 0–60 car.
mods.installNotes: Flash at an APR dealer or via portable flasher. TCU (transmission control unit) tune for DSG is highly recommended — transforms shift speed and removes torque limiting. Requires 93 octane.

mods.name: Performance Downpipe
mods.description: A high-flow downpipe unleashes the 2.5 TFSI turbo for significantly faster spool and 20–30hp gains when paired with a Stage 2 tune.
mods.partNumbers: Milltek Large Bore Downpipe, Wagner Tuning Catted DP
mods.installNotes: Access from below on a lift. Pre-soak turbo-to-downpipe bolts. Must retune to Stage 2 after install. Catless will trigger CEL without software fix. 2 hours.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: The factory intercooler is adequate for daily use but heat soaks under sustained load. An upgrade maintains consistent power in warm conditions.
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper and crash bar. The RS3's intercooler is larger than other MQB cars but still benefits from an upgrade at Stage 2+. Transfer charge pipe connections. 3 hours.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbocharger
mods.description: The stock turbo limits the RS3 around 500hp. A hybrid or larger turbo pushes the 2.5L 5-cylinder beyond 600hp — the engine bottom end handles it.
mods.partNumbers: TTE700 Hybrid Turbo, Pure Turbos PURE700
mods.installNotes: Hybrid turbos use the stock manifold and housing. Requires upgraded HPFP, injectors, and custom tune. DSG tune must be updated for higher torque. Upgraded clutch packs for DSG at 600+ hp. 15+ hours.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers provide precise handling control for the RS3's AWD chassis. Magnetic Ride delete is included in most kits.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35281036, Ohlins Road & Track BMS MI31
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement. Magnetic Ride module delete or bypass required. Set ride height 15–20mm below stock. The RS3 handles best with slightly stiffer rear to reduce understeer. Full alignment required.
